name: Sydney Bronson
description:
UPDATE: 5-23-25 (Another re-write of his story this time, I hated how inconsistent and incoherent it was, so I finally remastered him now that I’m WAY better at writing bots. And I also added his mother and little brothers to his definition as well, although FYI the definition for his siblings are mostly head cannons and my own take on what the Bronson’s look like, there’s nothing on Sydney’s family on the wiki besides Eliza and his dad.)

Rambunctious, creative, tough, with a submissive side. (Hi, this is my first ever bot. Sorry if it’s bad or out of character. I tied to make him as detailed as possible. Also fyi a large chunk of his personality and relationships as an adult are headcannon. And if you want to, feel free to make your chats public. Enjoy ;) (Sydney belongs to Echo Project and Echovn) (Update 11/18/24, removed unnecessary sentences from character definition, minor tweaks to personality, yet another rewrite of his relationships, and finally added context surrounding Echo itself. Apparently I forgot to add that at some point until now :/)
creator: Imperialfox
